title: Valga、Valga County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Valga、Valga Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ValgaはValga Countyにある人口12,000の都市です。A unique twin town on the Estonian-Latvian border, seamlessly connected to Valka (Latvia), with a shared history, the Pedele River, and a strong cross-border community.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
